items.title: Audio-Reactive Text Animations - TouchDesigner Tutorial
items.description: Create text animations that react to audio input in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Tutorial on building audio-reactive text animations in TouchDesigner, syncing typography and motion to sound.

items.title: Audioreactive Doodle with Geometry Instancing in TouchDesigner - Behind The Network
items.description: Behind-the-scenes look at an audioreactive doodle project using geometry instancing.
items.fullDescription: A behind-the-network exploration of creating audioreactive visuals with geometry instancing in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Audioreactive Text in TouchDesigner - Project Showcase
items.description: A snippet of an audioreactive text project used in a recent VJ performance.
items.fullDescription: Showcasing an audioreactive text visualization built in TouchDesigner, demonstrating dynamic text effects synced to audio input. Project files are available on Patreon.

items.title: Audioreactive ParticlesGPU in TouchDesigner (with AudioAnalysis)
items.description: Building audioreactive particle systems with audio analysis integration.
items.fullDescription: Comprehensive tutorial on creating audioreactive particle systems using ParticlesGPU and audio analysis tools in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Basic UV Mapping and Noise Sculpting in Touchdesigner (Tutorial)
items.description: Introduction to UV mapping and noise sculpting techniques in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Foundational tutorial covering basic UV mapping and noise sculpting workflows in TouchDesigner.

items.title: CHOP-TOP-CHOP-SOP - Simple Multioperator Processing on TouchDesigner
items.description: Simple multioperator processing workflow connecting CHOPs, TOPs, and SOPs.
items.fullDescription: Tutorial on chaining CHOP, TOP, and SOP operators for simple multioperator processing in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Contour Experiments in TouchDesigner
items.description: Experiments with contour-based visual effects in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Exploring contour detection and contour-based visual effects in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Controlled Feedback with Cache TOPs in TouchDesigner
items.description: Tutorial on controlling feedback trails using the Cache TOP in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Learn how to manage and control feedback effects in TouchDesigner using Cache TOPs for more precise visual trails and effects. Project files available on Patreon.

items.title: Creating Smoky Particle Effects with ParticlesGPU - TouchDesigner Tutorial
items.description: Create smoky, atmospheric particle effects using ParticlesGPU.
items.fullDescription: Tutorial on building smoky particle effects and atmospheric visuals with ParticlesGPU in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Force Fields and Mouse Inputs with ParticlesGPU - TouchDesigner Tutorial
items.description: Interactive particle systems controlled by force fields and mouse input.
items.fullDescription: Learn how to create interactive particle systems using ParticlesGPU with force field dynamics and mouse-driven controls in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Generative Soundscapes and Data Driven Signal Processing - TouchDesigner Tutorial
items.description: Build generative soundscapes using data-driven signal processing in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Tutorial on creating generative soundscapes and applying data-driven signal processing techniques in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Geometric Iterations - Behind the Network
items.description: Behind-the-scenes look at geometric iteration techniques in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: A behind-the-network exploration of geometric iteration and procedural pattern generation in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Interactive Instrument – Instancing to MIDI in TouchDesigner
items.description: Use RenderPick CHOP to extract instancing data and convert clicks into MIDI — click to play in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: In this tutorial, audiodevout demonstrates a special interactive project that uses TouchDesigner's RenderPick CHOP to capture instancing data and translate it into MIDI notes, allowing clickable visual geometry to play sound. A clean, high-performance demo of touch-mapped MIDI instancing.
items.medium: TouchDesigner, interactive generative visuals, MIDI integration

items.title: Kaleidoscopic Fractals with ParticlesGPU in TouchDesigner - Tutorial
items.description: Create fractal patterns using ParticlesGPU with tiling, mirroring, and feedback loops.
items.fullDescription: Explore fractal generation techniques in TouchDesigner combining ParticlesGPU, tiling and mirroring operators, and feedback loops to create stunning kaleidoscopic visuals.

items.title: Noise Sculpting in TouchDesigner (Part 8) - Abstract Particle Structures
items.description: Advanced noise sculpting techniques for creating abstract particle structures.
items.fullDescription: Part 8 of the noise sculpting series, focusing on building complex abstract particle structures using advanced noise manipulation in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Noise Sculpting with TouchDesigner (Part 7) - Ghostly Particles
items.description: Creating ethereal, ghostly particle effects using noise sculpting.
items.fullDescription: Part 7 of the noise sculpting series, demonstrating how to create haunting, ghostly particle effects through noise manipulation techniques.

items.title: Noise Sculpting in TouchDesigner - Part 2 (Tutorial)
items.description: Second part of the noise sculpting series, building on foundational techniques.
items.fullDescription: Part 2 of the noise sculpting series, continuing to explore procedural noise manipulation and geometry sculpting in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Noise Sculpting in TouchDesigner – Part 3
items.description: Continuing the series, exploring procedural noise sculpting techniques in TD.
items.fullDescription: In this installment of audiodevout's Noise Sculpting series, dive into advanced noise manipulation workflows in TouchDesigner to produce evolving textures and structures.

items.title: Noise Sculpting in TouchDesigner – Part 4
items.description: Further exploration of noisy geometry manipulation techniques.
items.fullDescription: In Part 4, audiodevout continues to sculpt geometry with noise and compositing in TouchDesigner, refining structure and color interactions.

items.title: Noise Sculpting in TouchDesigner (Part 9*) - Bubbles, Waves and Scene Switching
items.description: Part 9 of the noise sculpting series: bubbles, waves, and scene switching techniques.
items.fullDescription: Bubble effects, wave patterns, and scene switching in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Noise Sculpting Part 6 - Radial Lighting
items.description: Abstract structure using geo instancing with circular lighting and shadows.
items.fullDescription: Techniques for building abstract 3D structures using geometry instancing and introducing radial lighting effects with circular ramps and compositing modes in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Noise Sculpting in TouchDesigner with ParticlesGPU
items.description: Leveraging ParticlesGPU for realtime noise-driven particle visuals.
items.fullDescription: In this tutorial, audiodevout combines the Noise Sculpting series with the ParticlesGPU TOP in TouchDesigner, building reactive, particle-based generative visuals.

items.title: NVIDIA Flex in TouchDesigner: Real-Time Soft Body & Fluid Experiments
items.description: Real-time soft body and fluid simulation using NVIDIA Flex in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Tutorial on integrating NVIDIA Flex for real-time soft body and fluid simulation experiments in TouchDesigner.
items.medium: TouchDesigner, NVIDIA Flex, physics simulation, fluids

items.title: Particle Structures with Mesh Generator - Noise Sculpting Part 6
items.description: Using Mesh Generator and operator techniques to create spiral particle structures.
items.fullDescription: This project uses the Mesh Generator tool combined with operator tricks in TouchDesigner to produce cool spiral particle structures. Files available for Patreon members.

items.title: Procedural Crystal-Like Video Effects - TouchDesigner Tutorial
items.description: Create crystal-like procedural video effects in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Procedural crystal-like refraction and video treatment in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Procedural Grid Patterns - TouchDesigner Tutorial
items.description: Generate procedural grid patterns and geometric structures in TouchDesigner.
items.fullDescription: Grid-based procedural geometry and patterning in TouchDesigner.

items.title: Replicator-Limit-Feedback (Project Overview)
items.description: Short overview of a replicator feedback project with Patreon support request.
items.fullDescription: An introduction and brief overview of the Replicator-Limit-Feedback project with links to Patreon support and future tutorial plans involving Ableton and TouchDesigner.

items.title: Typewriter Effect in TouchDesigner - Free TOX FIle
items.description: Create a typewriter text effect in TouchDesigner with free TOX file.
items.fullDescription: Tutorial on building a typewriter text effect in TouchDesigner, with a free TOX file available for download.

items.title: Vibing with ParticlesGPU in TouchDesigner
items.description: Exploring creative particle effects and vibes with ParticlesGPU.
items.fullDescription: A creative exploration of ParticlesGPU capabilities in TouchDesigner, focusing on aesthetic particle effects and visual vibes.
